title: Implement Accessible Rich Internet Applications (ARIA) State Machines
description: Utilize ARIA attributes like `aria-expanded` and `aria-selected` to communicate UI states. Synchronize visual UI states with the accessibility layer using `aria-controls` in real-time.
objectives: Utilize ARIA attributes like `aria-expanded` and `aria-selected` to communicate UI states.
Synchronize visual UI states with the accessibility layer using `aria-controls` in real-time.
